title: HTML-escape user-controlled fields in dashboard renderer
description: render_dashboard_html interpolates task titles, IDs, status, kind, and module directly into HTML via .format() with no escaping. A task title containing '<', '>', or '"' would break the HTML structure. The fix is a html.escape() pass on all user-supplied values before interpolation. Pre-existing issue surfaced during MESH-15 review; the redesign added more injection points.
acceptance_criteria: Task titles containing <, >, ", ', and & render safely in the dashboard HTML
html.escape() applied to all user-supplied string values interpolated into HTML tags and attributes
Existing dashboard tests continue to pass
